creator: makoto@pinpott.spnet.ne.jp
text:
o Update patch for japanese/zangband satellite port.
	o Some variables moved to satellite port's Makefile.
	o No files added/removed.
	
	This update doesn't affect to games/zangband package,
	so I don't increase PORTREVISON. Satellite port have its
	own version (.j000922).

	Please commit this PR and satellite port's PR at the same time.
	Thanks.
